what: Validation of FCP's sRGB transfer-function constants via PCIssRGBTransferFunction(g,a,b,c,d).
result: PCIssRGBTransferFunction returns True for the canonical sRGB TRC (g=2.4, a=1/1.055=0.9479, b=0.055/1.055=0.0521, c=1/12.92=0.0774, d=0.04045) and False for pure-power 2.2/2.22. Confirms FCP uses the STANDARD piecewise sRGB curve, matching the engine's LUT_SRGB_TO_LINEAR constants.
relevance: Anchors the colour working-space work: when the chain-level linear pipeline is built to fix the cross-channel/mix divergence (Brightness/Colorize/Tint/HSV), the sRGB<->linear transform is the STANDARD sRGB curve (verified here), not a pure 2.2 gamma. Removes one unknown from the working-space fix.
also_available: PCIs709TransferFunction (Rec709 TRC test), PCEstimateGammaFromTransferFunction, HGPQ::EOTF/InverseEOTF (HDR PQ) — all exported, for future HDR/colour-space parity.
